description_long: This is a female adult pedestrian dressed in a formal school uniform, consisting of a fitted blazer with buttons, a collared shirt with a tie, and a pleated skirt. She wears knee-high socks and sturdy boots, giving her a practical yet formal appearance suitable for an urban or academic environment. Her hair is straight, parted in the middle, and falls to shoulder length, framing her face. The blazer features a subtle checkered pattern, and the overall outfit is tailored and neat, suggesting a disciplined or institutional context. Her arms are relaxed at her sides, and her posture is upright, indicating she is standing still. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and her attire is consistent with that of a student or young professional.
description: A female adult in a formal school uniform with a blazer, pleated skirt, knee-high socks, and boots, standing upright with shoulder-length straight hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full uniform, facial features, tie, and the front of the boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the straight fall of the hair, and the side of the blazer and skirt.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the blazer, skirt, and hair, as well as the backs of the boots and socks.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile, side of the uniform, and the straight hair.
attribute_clothing_type: formal school uniform with blazer, collared shirt, tie, and pleated skirt
